# Legrand

**Category:** Power Infrastructure, Modular / Prefabricated  
**Website:** https://www.legrand.us/

## Headline
Power and digital infrastructure vendor relevant to rack-level and white-space deployment quality.

## Overview
Legrand belongs in the directory for buyers comparing rack infrastructure, power distribution, and white-space readiness. It is often relevant when deployment quality and operational cleanliness matter more than giant platform scope.

## Key capabilities
- rack and white-space infrastructure
- power distribution support
- structured deployment systems

## Best fit for
- enterprise IT and facility teams
- buyers upgrading rack and white-space quality
- integrators improving deployment consistency

## Considerations
May be most valuable when compared within the rack/power-distribution layer rather than as a full-stack infrastructure platform.
